creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been working on a virtio_socket driver and AF_VSOCK as a pet project for some time now.

I even got the lxd-agent working (partially) at this point. It can open interactive consoles and copy files to and from the VM with a decent throughput.

I'm taking this project more seriously now but it's nowhere close to be ready to be reviewed, but I want to finish it eventually.

The code is here: (I'm very often force-pushing to this branch)

https://github.com/daniloegea/freebsd-src/tree/virtio_vsocks
